title: Dry Bulk Shipping - April 2, 2019
summary: The Vale drama continues - Vale reported their fourth quarter results this past week and provided more Australia's Port Lambert declares Force Majeure but impact limited - Another disruption for iron ore Scrapping remains robust - The good news for the dry bulk market is that given the low level of rates, Grain season is helping the smaller size segments - Strong demand for grain cargoes out of South America Long term neutral - Slower economic growth and the maturing nature of the Chinese economy when it
